The watermark 'youtube.com/thewolfepit' is visible in the bottom right corner.

spatial: The roasted chicken drumsticks are piled together in the center of the frame. The watermark text is located below and to the right of the chicken pieces.

visible_entities.desc: roasted chicken pieces with golden-brown, crispy skin, visible seasoning specks, and a glossy glaze
white text watermark reading 'youtube.com/thewolfeit' in a sans-serif font

atomic_facts.fact: The chicken pieces are arranged closely together in a pile.
The chicken skin has a shiny, glazed appearance indicating it is cooked.
A watermark text is visible in the bottom right corner of the frame.

spatial: The roasted chicken pieces fill the majority of the frame, piled in the center and foreground. The watermark text is located in the bottom right corner, overlaid on top of the chicken pieces.
